Unisex hair and beauty salon on St James Road listed only in directories and on Facebook — no mobile-friendly website means it's losing walk-in conversions from Google searches.

dts.title: DVSA wait times are broken — here's the fastest legal fix
dts.hook: Show a DVSA calendar screenshot with a 6-month wait, then cut to a swap confirmation screen, voiceover: 'You don't have to wait that long.'

dts.title: How I moved my driving test 4 months earlier without calling DVSA once
dts.hook: Step-by-step walkthrough of how test swapping works — frame it as a learner's perspective to drive relatability and shares from people in waiting queues.

athletics.title: Track Tuesday: 3 drills I do before every sprint session
athletics.hook: Film warm-up A-skips, wall drills, and acceleration build-up at the track — overlay your 40m split times, end with: 'Speed is a skill — here's how I train mine.'

athletics.title: One calisthenics skill I've been grinding for 60 days
athletics.hook: 30-second clip showing progress on a single skill (e.g., front lever, muscle-up, or L-sit to V-sit) filmed in the gym — day 1 vs. day 60 cut, no commentary needed.

aimybiz.title: Why your sales team keeps losing deals at the same stage
aimybiz.hook: Walk through a real objection scenario, show how CloseCoach gives instant AI feedback on the rep's response — end with: 'This is what coaching at scale looks like in 2026.'

aimybiz.title: 5 signs your SME sales team needs coaching — not more cold calls
aimybiz.hook: Slide 1: bold problem statement. Slides 2–6: one sign per slide with a micro-fix. Final slide: CloseCoach CTA with a soft pitch and link to demo or waitlist.
